content_body: This weekend, my friends and I stayed at Riverview Lodge. This cabin is amazing! It offers 5 bedrooms and 5.5 baths. With a group of 10, we had plenty of room. The views of the river and the mountains from this cabin are spectacular. We took a hike on the trail and relaxed in the gazebo next to the river. It snowed while we were visiting, which was an added bonus. We fired up the fire pit outside and laughed and talked for hours. This was a special trip for 5 couples. The rooms are very spacious and well furnished. All amenities are included with the cabin. I would recommend this place to couples, large families, or anyone who wants a little taste of country paradise. We will be returning very soon!!!
title: This Cabin is Amazing!
